scripts.k6:all: sh -c 'K6_BIN=${K6_BIN:-k6}; command -v "$K6_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "k6 is required. Install it or set K6_BIN=/absolute/path/to/k6."; exit 1; }; "$K6_BIN" run ./load-tests/all-scenarios.js'
scripts.k6:health: sh -c 'K6_BIN=${K6_BIN:-k6}; command -v "$K6_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "k6 is required. Install it or set K6_BIN=/absolute/path/to/k6."; exit 1; }; "$K6_BIN" run ./load-tests/health.js'
scripts.k6:stream:create: sh -c 'K6_BIN=${K6_BIN:-k6}; command -v "$K6_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "k6 is required. Install it or set K6_BIN=/absolute/path/to/k6."; exit 1; }; "$K6_BIN" run ./load-tests/stream-create.js'
scripts.k6:stream:withdraw: sh -c 'K6_BIN=${K6_BIN:-k6}; command -v "$K6_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "k6 is required. Install it or set K6_BIN=/absolute/path/to/k6."; exit 1; }; "$K6_BIN" run ./load-tests/stream-withdraw.js'
scripts.k6:mixed: sh -c 'K6_BIN=${K6_BIN:-k6}; command -v "$K6_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "k6 is required. Install it or set K6_BIN=/absolute/path/to/k6."; exit 1; }; "$K6_BIN" run ./load-tests/mixed.js'
